name: Bernie Sanders
subject: 2 victories tonight: Maine and the debate
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
While many in our country's political and financial establishment would love to see our campaign go away, tonight proved once again that we are well on our way towards winning this Democratic primary.
**We were declared the winner of the Maine caucus during the debate -- our 3rd victory out of 4 states this weekend -- and we reached 5 million individual contributions shortly before I stepped on stage.**
Tonight's debate highlighted a number of important differences between Hillary Clinton and myself, most notably on the issue of the disastrous trade agreements costing American jobs.
But we are now we are entering the most important stretch of this campaign, starting on Tuesday when Michigan votes. The billionaire class in this country is spending obscene amounts of money to try and stop us, but if we continue standing together, we're going to win:
[**Your $3 contribution ensures we 'll have the resources to win, and it sends a powerful message that you have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying our elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-maine?refcode=em160306 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-maine?refcode=em160306")
If we can do well in Michigan and again during next Tuesday's primaries, the map shifts dramatically in our favor. From that point forward, we expect to win the delegates we need to capture the Democratic Party's nomination. But that plan only works if we continue to stand together against the special interest money funding the Clinton campaign and super PACs.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-maine?refcode=em160306 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/we-won-maine?refcode=em160306")**

Peter, I'm proud to endorse my good friend John Kasich for President of the United States.

John knows that leadership is about serving people and he has a record of getting results. That's exactly what's needed in America right now.

[Please join the team today and show your support for John's campaign](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/34001149:si7ixvC-N:m:1:958431888:6000D2CF90FB3829F0218D00D669BFFF:r).

He not only led the effort to balance America's budget for the first time since men walked on the moon, but he turned a $8 billion budget shortfall in Ohio into a $2 billion surplus.

**Our country faces tremendous challenges right now** **but John knows, like I do, that it is still the greatest country in the world - no matter what anyone else says**. He's offering real, common-sense solutions to our greatest challenges.

**Peter \- it's time to roll up our sleeves and do our part**. [Join me today and support John Kasich for President of the United States!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/34001149:si7ixvC-N:m:1:958431888:6000D2CF90FB3829F0218D00D669BFFF:r)

name: Alice Stewart
subject: #CruzCrew Daily Briefing
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Over the past week,
we've seen incredible momentum build for Ted Cruz: starting with
last Super Tuesday, as Ted swept Texas, Oklahoma, and Alaska;
then at the debate on Thursday, as Ted focused on substance and
laid out his vision for an America with more jobs, enhanced
liberty, and greater security; and on Saturday, Ted won blowout
victories in Kansas and Maine.

We're seeing
conservatives, Republicans, and men and women of every walk of
life come together and unite behind our campaign. Ted Cruz will
always stand by his conservative principles - he's spent his life
defending our constitutional freedoms, and that's exactly how we
will beat Hillary - by staying conservative, or as Reagan liked
to say, by painting in bold colors. We simply cannot nominate a
candidate who, like Donald Trump, has spent the majority of his
life supporting many of the exact same policy positions as
Hillary Clinton.

Ted Cruz will never
abandon his principles because he's not in this for himself, but
for his kids, and for your children and grandchildren so that
they always enjoy the freedom, prosperity, and security that have
made this nation the last best hope on earth. The hope is still
alive, and if we stand together, it will grow even more abundant.

Best,

Alice Stewart
Communications
Director
www.tedcruz.org

name: Rand Paul
subject: Really?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:
Is a government who imprisons the man who
helped us locate and capture Osama bin Laden really an ally in
the fight against terrorism?

Believe or not, many of my colleagues in
Washington, D.C. believe the answer is "yes."

Not only that, but they think you and I
should keep handing them our tax dollars and selling them arms!

That's why I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE
action today to help me put an end to this madness.

Will you please sign this petition to my
colleagues, insisting we stop all arms sales to Pakistan, and
agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10
right away?

STAND WITH ME TO HALT
ARM SALES TO PAKISTAN TODAY!

Patriot, with $19 TRILLION in debt -- and
politicians still REFUSING to cut a dime of spending -- I can't
tell you how many times I've heard my colleagues defend the
indefensible.

But to me, foreign aid and arms sales to
Pakistan take the cake.

For nearly a decade after the 9-11 terror
attacks, the United States searched for Osama bin Laden.

And once he was found and finally brought to
justice, we learned that the Pakistani government imprisoned Dr.
Shakil Afridi for helping us!

Not only that, but they're assisting the
Afghan Taliban through their military and intelligence apparatus!

Whether it's punishing citizens who work with
us against terrorism -- or persecuting religious minorities like
Asa Bibi who was imprisoned simply for being a Christian --
Pakistan is no ally.

I think most Americans would agree that
American military technology should not be so readily sold to a
country who is contradicting American values at every turn and
funding terrorism around the world.

I'm doing everything I can to stop arms sales
to Pakistan.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me.

Please sign your petition and agree to your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

name: Majority Leader Mitch McConnell
subject: There's Not a Snowball’s Chance in Hell...
body:
Peter,

I've said it before, and I will say it again: **There is not a snowball's chance in hell that we will confirm President Obama's appointment to the Supreme Court.**

President Obama is determined to appoint a new progressive justice to the Supreme Court, now, in the twilight of his presidency. **The American people deserve better.**

The future of the U.S. Supreme Court will impact American policy for a generation to come. **The American people deserve to have a voice on this crucial matter.**

Senate Republicans are committed to waiting to vote on a new justice to the Supreme Court until next year: after the American people have decided on a new president.

[**I hope you will stand with Senate Republicans by signing the petition. Please stand with us on principle in this historically challenging time.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46513194:JjDb1qrN9:m:1:1516426255:7E94AF09B7B687EF3C51C2B53716E277:r)

The future of our Constitutional Republic depends on the actions of conservatives like you. I look forward to your continued support as we work together to defend the future of the U.S. Supreme Court and conservative policies in this country.

Thank you,

Mitch McConnell,
U.S. Senate Majority Leader

[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46513195:JjDb1qrN9:m:1:1516426255:7E94AF09B7B687EF3C51C2B53716E277:r)

CNN just aired a completely 100% made up report on anonymous rumors, so as soon as I saw it, I made my way to CNN and demand to correct the record on air. I told Wolf Blitzer that it was utter nonsense, and frankly irresponsible for him to continue repeating the reports. subject: [Michigan Poll] Clinton 52% - Sanders 47%
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Earlier today, Michigan State University released their final poll before tomorrow's primary, and I wanted to make sure you saw these results:
**Michigan State University Poll - Michigan(March 7, 2016)**
Hillary Clinton 52%
Bernie Sanders 47%
Last night's debate quite clearly laid out some of the differences in this primary: one candidate has opposed free trade deals that cost American jobs. One candidate supported the auto bailout and opposed the bank bailout. And one candidate believes we cannot change Wall Street's behavior by taking their money. That candidate is Bernie Sanders.
We were down over 20 points in Michigan in some polls as late as last week. Help power Bernie past the finish line today:
[**Your $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign will help us close the gap in Michigan and win a number of large and important primaries one week from tomorrow.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/michigan-poll?refcode=em160307full-e "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/michigan-poll?refcode=em160307full-e")
Our campaign is the best chance to take our country back from the billionaire class in this election. But the next two weeks will go a long way towards deciding whether we get that chance.
I believe if we stand together, we're going to win. And that's why your contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
